settings.title: System Console
settings.subtitle: Configure the core logic and identity of your autonomous agent.
settings.system_notice_content: Configuring these keys allows the AIMAXXING kernel to communicate with global LLM providers. Changes to the Server Port require a manual restart of the gateway process.

identity.title: Core Personality (Base Traits)
identity.description: The "Biological" base of the agent. These sliders define the innate temperamental range and communication tone.

soul.title: Spirit & Knowledge (Soul Files)
soul.description: The "Digital Life" memory. AIMAXXING dynamically reads all .md files in this folder to inject modular intelligence.
soul.info: Add .md files to this folder to grant your agent new knowledge or complex behavioral instructions without restarting.

environment.title: Environment
environment.port_notice: Port changes require a manual process restart.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: AIMAXXING (Advanced Autonomous AI Agent Concept Law) Control Hub

skills.title: Skill Store
skills.subtitle: Expand your agent's capabilities by enabling specialized plugins.
skills.no_skills: No skills found in your distribution.

chat.new_chat: Start a conversation with the agent.

persona.title: Soul & Identity
persona.subtitle: Sculpt your agent's personality traits and behavioral boundaries.
persona.backstory_placeholder: Describe the agent's history and motivation...
persona.note_content: Personality traits directly influence the LLM's system prompt and reasoning style. A high Openness score encourages creative problem solving, while high Conscientiousness ensures the agent adheres strictly to provided instructions and safety protocols.

tasks.title: Scheduled Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Manage automated cron jobs, heartbeat routines, and periodic workflows.

logs.title: System Logs
logs.subtitle: Real-time stream of kernel events, skill executions, and network activity.

terminal.title: Console Access
terminal.subtitle: Direct command-line interface to the agent's runtime environment.
